*comment Container preview: Main Section — generated by editor
*set brutality 50
*set cunning   50
*set disdain   50
*set infamy    0
*set wealth    5000
*set wounds    0
*set blasphemy 0

*comment = Main Section
*comment using the equals sign like this makes an editor container
*comment these act kinda like "files" and let you scope the editor view
*comment down to specific sections of your script
*comment the "container selection" is the thing that says (full file)
*choice
  #This editor has a lot of QOL changes
    *goto claws
  # < look at these collapsables
*comment == Woah a sub section mark????!
*comment this lets you add a sub container :D
*comment sub containers are visible if you hover the container
*comment they belong to in the container drop down
    *label claws
    In that case, you'll have powerful claws and a mighty roar!
    *finish
  #But also you can scope the editro view to sections
    As if they were completely different files!
    *finish
